/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -I/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/include -I/opt/homebrew/opt/flex/include -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/bison/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/flex/lib CMakeFiles/lefdiff.dir/lefdiff/diffLefRW.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lefdiff.dir/lefdiff/differLef.cpp.o -o bin/lefdiff  liblef.a /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
